name: Ansell Limited
analysis: ANN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$29.7800. Trade idea: entry A$30.2100, stop A$27.3141, target A$33.3581 (1.09:1) — then trail it.
